### WEF Global Cybersecurity Outlook 2025
WEF's Global Cybersecurity Outlook 2025 highlights the increasing complexity of the cyber landscape characterized by geopolitical uncertainties, emerging technologies, and sophisticated cyberthreats, and provides a collaborative and globally harmonized approach to quantum security.
[Download](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/WEF-Global-Cybersecurity-Outlook-2025.pdf)
[Achieving Quantum Resilience in Cybersecurity](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/Vikram%20Sharma%20on%20Achieving%20Quantum%20Resilience%20in%20Cybersecurity%20at%20OODAcon.mp4)
![OODA-Video-Graphic-Card](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/OODA-Video-Graphic-Card.webp)
Video
### Achieving Quantum Resilience in Cybersecurity
Our Founder and CEO Vikram Sharma, shares his insights on the intersection of quantum technology and cybersecurity at OODAcon—and how fighting quantum with quantum, enables a migration to a quantum resilient posture. 
[Watch](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/Vikram%20Sharma%20on%20Achieving%20Quantum%20Resilience%20in%20Cybersecurity%20at%20OODAcon.mp4)
[From Quantum Revolution To Quantum Resilience](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/resources/videos/QLabs-From-Quantum-Revolution-To-Quantum-Resilience-Video.mp4)
![QLabs-From-Quantum-Revolution-To-Quantum-Resilience-Resource-Thumbnail](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/resources/images/QLabs-From-Quantum-Revolution-To-Quantum-Resilience-Resource-Thumbnail.png)
Video
### From Quantum Revolution To Quantum Resilience
Founder and CEO Vikram Sharma explains the significance of the new quantum era, its impact on e-commerce, digital security, and business strategy, and why Quantum Resilience will define winners and losers.
[Watch](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/resources/videos/QLabs-From-Quantum-Revolution-To-Quantum-Resilience-Video.mp4)
[Guide to Quantum](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/guide-to-quantum-and-understanding-quantum-risk)
![guide-to-quantam-resources](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/resources/images/guide-to-quantam-resources.png)
eBook
### Guide to Quantum
Quantum cyberattacks have the potential to completely disrupt all commonly secured data, information systems, and infrastructure. Read our guide to understand who and what is at risk and why quantum is a security priority now.
[Download](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/guide-to-quantum-and-understanding-quantum-risk)
